name: Story Agent Comprehensive Evaluation Set
description: Comprehensive evaluation scenarios for story_agent covering various keyword combinations, edge cases, and story quality metrics

user_content.text: tiny robot, lost kitten, rainy city

expected_response.story: In a shimmering city where rain always fell, a tiny brass robot named Rusty found a shivering kitten tucked behind a neon sign. Rusty shared his umbrella-hat, and together they navigated the glowing streets to find the kitten's home. In the end, they became the best of friends, proving that even in a cold city, warmth can be found.

main_characters.name: Rusty
main_characters.description: A small, round robot made of polished brass with glowing blue circular eyes and a single antennae with a red tip.

main_characters.name: Whiskers
main_characters.description: A tiny, fluffy orange kitten with white paws and big, curious green eyes.

scenes.title: The Setup
scenes.description: A dark, rainy alleyway in a futuristic city with neon lights reflecting in puddles.
scenes.text: Rusty the robot was trundling through the neon-lit puddles of the rainy city.

scenes.title: The Inciting Incident
scenes.description: Rusty discovers a small shivering kitten behind a glowing sign.
scenes.text: Behind a flickering blue sign, Rusty heard a faint meow and saw a tiny kitten.

scenes.title: The Climax
scenes.description: Rusty and the kitten brave a heavy downpour together.
scenes.text: The rain turned into a downpour, but Rusty used his metal frame to shield his new friend.

scenes.title: The Resolution
scenes.description: Rusty and the kitten at home, safe and dry.
scenes.text: They reached a cozy shelter, where they both fell asleep, safe from the storm.
